Entry #1367 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: LETTER MOTION to Compel Microsoft Corp. to produce user metrics data for its Refreshed Copilot product addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Steven Lieberman and Davida Brook dated April 29, 2026. Document filed by Chicago Tribune Company, LLC, DP Media Network, LLC, Daily News LP, Northwest Publications, LLC, ORB Publishing, LLC, Orlando Sentinel Communications Company, LLC, San Jose Mercury-News, LLC, Sun-sentinel Company, LLC, The New York Times Company. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A - D. Levenson Deposition Transcript, # 2 Exhibit B - O. Amir Copilot Expert Report, # 3 Exhibit C - Meet and Confer Emails, # 4 Exhibit D - December 2, 2025 Conference Transcript)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Lieberman, Steven) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1366 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: ***SEALED*** LETTER MOTION to Compel Microsoft Corp. to produce user metrics data for its Refreshed Copilot product addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Steven Lieberman and Davida Brook dated April 29, 2026. Document filed by Chicago Tribune Company, LLC, DP Media Network, LLC, Daily News LP, Northwest Publications, LLC, ORB Publishing, LLC, Orlando Sentinel Communications Company, LLC, San Jose Mercury-News, LLC, Sun-sentinel Company, LLC, The New York Times Company. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A - D. Levenson Deposition Transcript, # 2 Exhibit B - O. Amir Copilot Expert Report, # 3 Exhibit C - Meet and Confer Emails)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTWMotion or Order to File Under Seal: 367 .(Lieberman, Steven) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1365 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: REDACTION to (1513 in 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW) LETTER MOTION to Compel OpenAI to Present a Rule 30(b)(6) Witness addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Davida Brook dated April 29, 2026. by The New York Times Company (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit 2, # 2 Exhibit 3)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW et al..(Brook, Davida) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1364 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: ***SEALED*** LETTER MOTION to Compel OpenAI to Present a Rule 30(b)(6) Witness addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Davida Brook dated April 29, 2026. Document filed by The New York Times Company. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit 1, # 2 Exhibit 4)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW et al.Motion or Order to File Under Seal: 1510 .(Brook, Davida) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1363 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: REDACTION to (1511 in 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW) LETTER MOTION to Compel Microsoft to Produce Documents Related to Microsoft's Express License Defense addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Davida Brook dated April 29, 2026. by The New York Times Company (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Brook, Davida) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1362 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: ***SEALED*** LETTER MOTION to Compel Microsoft to Produce Documents Related to Microsoft's Express License Defense addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Davida Brook dated April 29, 2026. Document filed by The New York Times Company. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A, # 2 Exhibit B, # 3 Exhibit C)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTWMotion or Order to File Under Seal: 1510 .(Brook, Davida) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1361 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: MOTION to Seal Discovery Motions. Document filed by The New York Times Company.Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW et al..(Brook, Davida) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1360 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE of ***SEALED*** LETTER MOTION to Compel The New York Times to Produce Brand Tracker Data Exports (1506) served on All Plaintiffs and OpenAI Defendants on April 29, 2026. Service was made by E-mail. Document filed by Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation. Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Najemy, Laura) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1359 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
entry.summary: LETTER MOTION to Compel The New York Times Company to Produce Brand Tracker Data Exports addressed to Magistrate Judge Ona T. Wang from Laura Najemy dated April 29, 2026. Document filed by Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A - Filed Under Seal, # 2 Exhibit B, # 3 Exhibit C - Filed Under Seal, # 4 Exhibit D - Filed Under Seal, # 5 Exhibit E - Filed Under Seal, # 6 Exhibit F - Filed Under Seal)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTW.(Najemy, Laura) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1358 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195

Document filed by Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation, Microsoft Corporation. (Attachments: # 1 Exhibit A - Sealed, # 2 Exhibit C - Sealed, # 3 Exhibit D - Sealed, # 4 Exhibit E - Sealed, # 5 Exhibit F - Sealed)Filed In Associated Cases: 1:25-md-03143-SHS-OTW, 1:23-cv-11195-SHS-OTWMotion or Order to File Under Seal: 1504 .(Najemy, Laura) (Entered: 04/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1357 in The New York Times Company v. Microsoft Corporation, 1:23-cv-11195
